provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and cultural detail, visible brushstrokes, cross-species market scene with pidgin trade-sign communication — a human merchant and a Keth trader facing each other over a display of goods, both making exaggerated hand gestures that form the pidgin trade language, drawn symbols chalked on a board between them showing quantities and prices, other species passing in the background, the practical reality of multi-species commerce without universal translators
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine, heroic pose, action scene, combat, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, cute, chibi

judgment.explanation: Partial hit — atmosphere and style correct, some species anatomy or concept details missed.
